entry.name: locale
entry.label: Language code for TradingView (e.g. en, es)

entry.name: showChart
entry.label: Show mini chart below the symbol list

entry.name: showSymbolLogo
entry.label: Show symbol logos in the list

entry.name: showFloatingTooltip
entry.label: Show floating tooltip with price details on chart hover

entry.name: customSymbols
entry.label: Custom symbols to track, one per line (format EXCHANGE:TICKER,Name). Empty = default tabs.
